training.loss: MSE on train-normal-standard-deviation-scaled dense process targets

notes: All Phase09 samples are Raman-aligned windows; Raman spectra are used only at the source time, never from the future.
Raman PCA scores are generated by Phase08 using train_normal-only PCA fitting.
process_tcn is the Raman-aligned process-only baseline.
naive_pca_tcn is the direct PCA concatenation baseline that Phase08 showed can cause slight negative transfer.
gated_pca_tcn learns a data-driven target-agnostic feature gate; no manual gate weights are used.
attention_pca_tcn learns query-based attention from the process state to Raman PC tokens; attention parameters are trained from data.
Checkpoints are selected by val_normal loss. test_fault is used only for final evaluation.
